sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me click on the red target at the correct position
print("=== Clicking red target at row 31, col 19 ===")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 19}])

lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== After clicking red target ===")
for r in range(24, 34):
    row_str = lines[r][0:32]
    if any(c not in 'cG' for c in row_str):
        print(f"Row {r}: {row_str}")

# Check if red bar changed
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
